name: Cattle Ranch Bar-b-Que Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Bacon grease (1 cup Wesson oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine all ingredients.
2. Stir the mixture to ensure even distribution of flavors.
3. Place the pot over low heat and allow it to simmer for at least 20 minutes, stirring occasionally until fully combined.
Source: Best Barbeque Recipes, by Mildred Fischer
